since_last: 43% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +1.72%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -0.69% · Gold -0.32% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 43% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +1.72%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.72%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.19%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.41%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.41%, BIDU +6.43%, PUBM +2.93%, CEVA +2.41%, CHKP +2.04%. Laggards: MU -3.43%, MRVL -1.17%, IBM -1.15%, ARM -1.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.43% at $151.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
